# captureScreenshot(rect:configuration:completionHandler:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ ScreenCaptureKit ](/documentation/screencapturekit)

-  captureScreenshot(rect:configuration:completionHandler:) 

Type Method# captureScreenshot(rect:configuration:completionHandler:)

Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+

```
class func captureScreenshot(
    rect: CGRect,
    configuration config: SCScreenshotConfiguration,
    completionHandler: (@Sendable (SCScreenshotOutput?, (any Error)?) -> Void)? = nil
)
```



```
class func captureScreenshot(
    rect: CGRect,
    configuration config: SCScreenshotConfiguration
) async throws -> SCScreenshotOutput
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCScreenshotManager/captureScreenshot(rect:configuration:completionHandler:)#parameters)

`rect`The rect for the region in points on the screen space for the screen shot, this is display agnostic and supports multiple displays

`config`Is the screenshot configuration containing information on how to format the screenshot

`completionHandler`Is the handler that will deliver the SCScreenshotOutput object to the client

## [Discussion](/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCScreenshotManager/captureScreenshot(rect:configuration:completionHandler:)#discussion)

captureScreenshotWithRect:configuration:completionHandler:

this method returns an SCScreenshotOutput object containing CGImages of the screenshot requested by the client
